entities.name: PIGEON PEA
entities.description: An important orphan crop (Cajanus cajan) grown by smallholder farmers in India and Africa

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A region where pigeon pea is grown and from where accessions were sourced

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A region where pigeon pea is grown

entities.name: PHILIPPINES
entities.description: A region from where pigeon pea accessions were sourced

entities.name: PANGENOME
entities.description: The first comprehensive genome representation of pigeon pea based on 89 accessions

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variation in genetic makeup, specifically noted between Philippine and Indian individuals

entities.name: VARIABLE GENES
entities.description: Genes that vary across accessions and are linked to specific traits

entities.name: SELF-FERTILIZATION
entities.description: A reproductive trait associated with variable genes

entities.name: RESPONSE TO DISEASE
entities.description: A trait related to the plant's ability to react to diseases, associated with variable genes

entities.name: SNPS
entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphisms associated with agronomically important traits

entities.name: AGRONOMICALLY IMPORTANT TRAITS
entities.description: Nine traits of agricultural significance associated with SNPs

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTION FACTORS
entities.description: Genes that regulate the transcription of other genes, associated with SNPs

entities.name: KINASES
entities.description: Enzymes that modify other proteins, associated with SNPs

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMME
entities.description: A systematic approach to improve pigeon pea based on genomic results
